name: Monday.com
description: Work management platform for team collaboration. Verifies employee access, app availability, and data governance controls in Monday.com.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to monday.com as an admin
2. Click your profile picture > Developers
3. Click API token > Show
4. Copy your personal API token
5. Paste it below

checks.name: Monday.com App Availability
checks.description: Verifies that the Monday.com API is accessible and the account is active by querying the authenticated user profile.

checks.name: Monday.com Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews all users in the Monday.com account, verifying active/inactive status and admin roles for access governance.

checks.name: Monday.com Data Governance
checks.description: Audits board access and sharing settings to verify data governance controls are in place.
